creator: Ivan Mehta
title: (No AI) DeepL acquires Mixhalo for live-event audio streaming and translation

content: With this acquisition, DeepL is opening an office in San Francisco to expand its U.S. business.

creator: Sarah Perez
title: (No AI) Pinterest launches an experimental AI shopping app called ‘Ask Pinterest’
dc:creator: Sarah Perez
content: Pinterest has launched 'Ask Pinterest,' an experimental AI-powered shopping app that lets users seek recommendations and inspiration through a conversational interface.
contentSnippet: Pinterest has launched 'Ask Pinterest,' an experimental AI-powered shopping app that lets users seek recommendations and inspiration through a conversational interface.

title: (No AI) The next humanoid robot might not look human at all
author: Robert Hart
content:
![](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/Genesis-Eno-Home-Pebble-Beach-CA-06062026-Pouring.png?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

The [next humanoid robot](https://www.theverge.com/column/843418/humanoid-robot-hype) might not have a head. It might not have legs. It might even sit on a wheeled base and fold down like a deck chair. But, as Genesis AI [puts it](https://x.com/gs_ai_/status/2066869851659121128?s=20), "humanoid robots don't need to look human."

That explains the look of Eno, the [new robot](https://www.genesis.ai/press/meet-eno) from the French startup backed by former Google CEO Eric Schmidt. Genesis says Eno is designed "around human capability" rather than human appearance and is intended as a fully "general-purpose" robot rather than a machine built around a single task, like [folding laundry](https://www.theverge.com/tech/877851/weave-isaac-robot-fold-laundry). One part is still very human though: its hands, which the company says are designed to "exactly match the form and fu …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/951283/genesis-ai-humanoid-robot-eno)

The next humanoid robot might not have a head. It might not have legs. It might even sit on a wheeled base and fold down like a deck chair. But, as Genesis AI puts it, "humanoid robots don't need to look human." 
That explains the look of Eno, the new robot from the French startup backed by former Google CEO Eric Schmidt. Genesis says Eno is designed "around human capability" rather than human appearance and is intended as a fully "general-purpose" robot rather than a machine built around a single task, like folding laundry. One part is still very human though: its hands, which the company says are designed to "exactly match the form and fu …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: (No AI) Apple 2027 rumors: AirPods with cameras for AI and the second folding iPhone
author: Richard Lawler
content:
![](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2025/09/257943_Airpods_Pro3_AKrales_0078.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

AirPods Pro 3 shown with an iPhone and live translation features. | Photo by Amelia Holowaty Krales / The Verge

Now that we're clear of [WWDC](https://www.theverge.com/tech/944110/wwdc-2026-news-announcements) and all of the new AI-powered features coming to Apple's platforms, [_Bloomberg_](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-06-16/apple-plans-camera-airpods-iphone-foldable-2-20th-anniversary-iphone-in-2027) reporter Mark Gurman has more details about rumored new hardware, like the [camera-equipped AirPods](https://www.theverge.com/tech/926376/apple-airpods-cameras-ai-production) he'd [previously written about](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-05-07/apple-s-camera-equipped-airpods-reach-advanced-testing-stage-in-ai-device-push?srnd=undefined). He says they are currently on schedule for a late 2027 launch, and that while we're checking out beta releases for this fall's iOS 27 update, the new earbuds are internally being tested with next year's update, iOS 28.

With cameras mounted in their stems and lights to indicate when data is being uploaded to the cloud, they could give the upgraded version of Siri "visual context" about your surroundings, be …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/tech/950826/apple-airpod-camera-ai-foldable-iphone-rumor)
contentSnippet:
AirPods Pro 3 shown with an iPhone and live translation features. | Photo by Amelia Holowaty Krales / The Verge	

Now that we're clear of WWDC and all of the new AI-powered features coming to Apple's platforms, Bloomberg reporter Mark Gurman has more details about rumored new hardware, like the camera-equipped AirPods he'd previously written about. He says they are currently on schedule for a late 2027 launch, and that while we're checking out beta releases for this fall's iOS 27 update, the new earbuds are internally being tested with next year's update, iOS 28.
 With cameras mounted in their stems and lights to indicate when data is being uploaded to the cloud, they could give the upgraded version of Siri "visual context"  about your surroundings, be …
Read the full story at The Verge.

He says they are currently on schedule for a late 2027 launch, and that while we're checking out beta […]

title: (No AI) Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
content: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.
contentSnippet: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.

title: (No AI) Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
content: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.
contentSnippet: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.

title: (No AI) Unlocking UK house-building with AI-accelerated planning
content: UK government partners with Google DeepMind to build a new AI-powered prototype aimed at faster housing decisions.
contentSnippet: UK government partners with Google DeepMind to build a new AI-powered prototype aimed at faster housing decisions.

creator: Lily Hay Newman
title: (No AI) ‘Dangerous’ AI Models Are Coming No Matter What
dc:creator: Lily Hay Newman
content: The US government crackdown on Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 hides a glaring truth: AI models with advanced hacking capabilities will soon be the norm.
contentSnippet: The US government crackdown on Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 hides a glaring truth: AI models with advanced hacking capabilities will soon be the norm.

creator: Steven Blum
title: (No AI) My Father Wants to Age in Place. AI Will Be Watching
dc:creator: Steven Blum
content: Devices that monitor seniors for safety are appealing to worried loved ones and underresourced home care agencies.
contentSnippet: Devices that monitor seniors for safety are appealing to worried loved ones and underresourced home care agencies.
